description: Configure a hardware calibration profile and create a visual experiment using perceptual units. Create a monitor definition named 'LabView' with a screen distance of 57.0 cm, screen width of 53.5 cm, and resolution of 1920 x 1080 pixels. In a new experiment, set the monitor to 'LabView' and create a routine with a Grating stimulus using 'deg' (degrees of visual angle) units. Set the Grating size to (4.0, 4.0) and the spatial frequency to 2.0 cycles/degree. Save the experiment to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/visual_angle_test.psyexp.
